answerEngineSummary: Fieldwork is Ryan Baumann’s developer notebook. Ryan is a Developer Experience Engineering and product lead who builds tools, evals, and workflows for humans and AI coding agents. His current work at Google Maps Platform includes Code Assist, agent skills, and an agentic eval suite.
